title: About Us - Premium Jackets & Outerwear
description: Learn about JacketVerse's mission to offer the best premium jackets and create a community of style-conscious customers. Discover our story, values, and commitment to quality outerwear.

hero.title: Our Story
hero.subtitle: Founded for everyone who loves jackets. JacketVerse was born from a passion for quality outerwear and a desire to offer the best selection for every style and season.

introduction.title: Who We Are
introduction.subtitle: A team dedicated to premium jackets and outerwear for every lifestyle
introduction.description: JacketVerse is more than just a jacket store—we're a destination for anyone who values quality outerwear. From leather and bomber jackets to trench coats and puffers, we curate styles for every season and occasion. We believe everyone deserves access to well-made, stylish jackets that last.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: Our mission is to provide customers with the highest quality jackets, from classic leather and denim to modern technical outerwear. We believe every wardrobe deserves versatile, durable jackets that reflect your style.

values.title: Our Values
values.subtitle: The principles that guide everything we do

features.title: Curated Selection
features.description: Every jacket we offer is chosen for quality, style, and versatility. We work with trusted brands and materials so you can shop with confidence.

features.title: Premium Quality
features.description: We never compromise on quality. From materials to construction, we ensure our jackets are built to last and perform in every season.

features.title: Community First
features.description: We listen to our customers and evolve our collection based on real feedback. JacketVerse is for everyone who loves great outerwear.

team.name: Alex Thompson
team.description: Founded JacketVerse to make premium jackets accessible to everyone. Passionate about quality outerwear and customer experience.

team.name: Sarah Martinez
team.description: Leads our curation and style direction. Ensures every jacket we offer meets our standards for design and durability.

team.name: Mike Chen
team.description: Ensures every product meets our high standards before it reaches our customers.

cta.title: Join Our Community
cta.subtitle: Become part of JacketVerse. Get exclusive updates, styling tips, and be the first to know about new arrivals and offers.

additionalContent.paragraph1: JacketVerse is your destination for premium jackets—leather, bomber, denim, puffer, trench, and more. We curate styles for every season and lifestyle, so you can find the perfect jacket for any occasion.
additionalContent.paragraph2: Our mission is to provide customers with the highest quality jackets and exceptional service. We believe everyone deserves access to well-made, stylish outerwear that lasts.
additionalContent.paragraph3: We listen to our customers and constantly evolve our collection based on feedback. That commitment ensures we stay true to what jacket lovers really want.
